Come and join us.

7 Struan Road, Glasgow G44 3AT

🚆 By train Cathcart Station, 5 min walk
🚌 By bus First Bus 4 & 6
🚗 By car On-street parking nearby
♿ Accessibility Step-free & hearing loop
—  GROW ✝ SERVE ✝ SHARE  —
🚆

By Train

Cathcart Railway Station is approximately 400 metres away — around a 5-minute walk. The following ScotRail services stop at Cathcart:

  • The Cathcart Circle Line from Glasgow Central
  • The Neilston Line from Glasgow Central

Please note the Newton train does not stop at Cathcart.

ScotRail timetables →
🚌

By Bus

First Bus services 4 and 6 stop on Clarkston Road, a short walk from the church.

First Bus timetables →

By Car

There is a small church car park (around 12 spaces) accessed via the lane beside the church building — approximately 25 metres from the car park to the front door. Additional on-street parking is available on Struan Road and Kildare Road, though it can be busier when events are on at the nearby Couper Institute.

There is no designated Blue Badge parking, but the entrance is step-free from the car park and a hearing loop system is available inside.

💻

Joining Us Online

If you cannot join us in person, our Sunday service is livestreamed every week on YouTube and is also available on Zoom.

Watch on YouTube →

To receive Zoom joining details please get in touch and we will send them to you.

Contact us for Zoom details →
—  GROW ✝ SERVE ✝ SHARE  —
